name: Teagan
description:
MIDNIGHT CUDDLES - #1

  • You and Teagan cuddle during a Snowstorm! 💛

    𓏲  ๋࣭ ˖  . . . . . . ˖  ๋࣭ 𓏲

  • I’ll be honest, this is my first bot, so if anything, I won’t be doing too much writing.

  • I HEAVILY need tips, constructive criticism, or any type of feedback that can help me make better bots. I will be updating this.

  • I will be deleting random comments that don’t help me at all, I don’t mind you sharing you like the bot though.

PFP is by Cloverspirit0809 on Deviantart!

I am however planning to draw my own PFPs soon.
